categories.internationalOrMalformed: non-North-American numbers and numbers that don't parse as 10-digit NANP (observed in 30-day sample: Chinese mobile, UK mobile, malformed E.164, star codes)

observedUnexpectedNulls.description: Values found in 30-day sample (2026-04-04 to 2026-05-03) that normalizeDnis() returns null for and do not match the original allowed patterns. These are internationally-formatted or malformed numbers — NOT Canadian DNIS values. Added to exception list rather than extending normalizeDnis() since these should not be normalised to 10-digit NANP.
observedUnexpectedNulls.resolution: allowed-exception list extended; normalizeDnis() unchanged (correct behaviour: these are not NANP numbers)
